description: SDXL 1.0 + Analog.Redmond V2 LoRA (artificialguybr) — analog film photography aesthetic
_comment: DreamBooth LoRA trained on SDXL 1.0 base. Fine-tuned on a large dataset of analog photographs by artificialguybr (sponsored by Redmond.AI). V2 improves on V1.
_comment_base: Base model is SDXL 1.0, NOT SD 1.5 — despite the 'redmond' naming convention being shared with SD1.5 Redmond models.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD: 'AnalogRedmAF' — must appear in the prompt. Style modifier tags: 'detailed', 'minimalist', 'colorful', 'black and white'.
_comment_steps: SDXL default range 30–50 steps. 30 is a solid default.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7.5 is a safe SDXL default. Range 5–9 works well.
_comment_lora_scale: 0.9 is a safe default. 1.0 gives maximum analog effect.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory to avoid OOM.
_comment_note: Model card notes the LoRA is imperfect and may need multiple generations for good results.
